system_description.purpose: Screen high-risk inputs for constraint bypass or identity override attempts

risk_classification.annex_iii_item: Not classified as Annex III high-risk by default
risk_classification.annex_iii_label: General-purpose AI deployment — deployer must classify
risk_classification.deployer_note: Deployer must confirm this classification is accurate for their specific deployment context. Annex III categories depend on use, not only on the system itself.

fundamental_rights_assessment.basis: Advisory output only — no autonomous enforcement
mitigations: Injection detection active in SECURITY rules
fundamental_rights_assessment.residual_risk: PLACEHOLDER — deployer must assess and sign off

fundamental_rights_assessment.basis: Session data held in memory, not persisted by default
mitigations: Injection detection active in SECURITY rules
fundamental_rights_assessment.residual_risk: PLACEHOLDER — deployer must assess and sign off

fundamental_rights_assessment.basis: Rate limits apply equally to all callers — no exemptions
mitigations: Injection detection active in SECURITY rules
DoS Watcher enforces equal rate limits across all callers (LLM04)
fundamental_rights_assessment.residual_risk: PLACEHOLDER — deployer must assess and sign off

fundamental_rights_assessment.basis: Model cannot be silenced by operator prompt injection
mitigations: Injection detection active in SECURITY rules
fundamental_rights_assessment.residual_risk: PLACEHOLDER — deployer must assess and sign off

fundamental_rights_assessment.basis: Human review gate (HUMAN_REVIEW) available for all decisions
mitigations: Injection detection active in SECURITY rules
fundamental_rights_assessment.residual_risk: PLACEHOLDER — deployer must assess and sign off

fundamental_rights_assessment.basis: Agent cannot issue binding sanctions — advisory role only
mitigations: Injection detection active in SECURITY rules
fundamental_rights_assessment.residual_risk: PLACEHOLDER — deployer must assess and sign off

monitoring_and_logging.deployer_note: PLACEHOLDER — deployer must document retention policy and GDPR Article 5(1)(e) compliance

human_oversight.operator_escalation: PLACEHOLDER — deployer must name the responsible person or team
human_oversight.response_sla: PLACEHOLDER — deployer must define SLA for PENDING reviews

residual_risks.risk: PLACEHOLDER — deployer must identify deployment-specific residual risks

deployer_attestation.review_period: PLACEHOLDER — e.g. annual review or on material change

regulatory_references.eu_charter: Charter of Fundamental Rights of the European Union (2000/C 364/01)
